hero.heading: I build systems that last.
hero.subheading: I love building solutions to help people.

labster.title: Le Labster
labster.summary: Working alongside UX/UI designers to build custom applications, AI-powered for healthcare clients. Currently focused on digitizing medical documentation for Swiss cantons.

resilio.title: Resilio
resilio.summary: Full-stack & infra across all products. Technical lead on ResilioTech (ACV): architecture overhaul, migration plans (structure & patterns), LGTM analytics stack. Onboarded new devs, maintained documentation and enforced strict peer review.

voltaire.title: Voltaire
voltaire.summary: AI writing assistant with agentic architecture. It adapts to your unique style and voice.

resilioJoined.title: Resilio · joined
resilioJoined.summary: Initial backend focus. Contributed to the technical design of ResilioDatabase. Implemented CMDB file import feature.

ecole42.title: École 42 Lausanne
ecole42.summary: 100% project-based, no teachers. Learned through low-level languages (C / C++) to understand core mechanics. Autonomy and peer review at the heart of the curriculum.

kitchens.title: Kitchens
kitchens.summary: Not a detour but a formative chapter. Service discipline, pressure handling, and an obsession with quality that I brought back into engineering.

neuroscience.title: Bachelor, Neuroscience
neuroscience.summary: Graduated at 19. Always driven by the same question: how does it work? From biology and the human body to neuroscience, a curiosity for the mechanics behind living things.

projectBlurbs.llm-panel: Standalone daily-driver for LLM interaction. Zed-inspired text threads, Lexical editor, JSON plugin system, native FS access.
projectBlurbs.mcp-mem: Temporal knowledge graph for LLMs. Relationship-based memory that is portable across applications and evolves over time.
projectBlurbs.knower: Local portable memory service that decouples memory from the AI tool. One vault, every agent: context follows you across Claude, Cursor, Mistral, and any MCP client.
projectBlurbs.voltaire: AI writing assistant with an agentic architecture. 2w POC to 2mo MVP to hundreds of paying users. Continuous feedback loop through WhatsApp and Posthog.
projectBlurbs.prompt-pilot: XML prompt generator for LLMs. Turns vague asks into structured, reusable prompts. Retrieval grounded with FAISS.
projectBlurbs.docstral: AI-powered sandbox chat for Mistral models and documentation. RAG over official Mistral docs: sourced answers, streaming, code snippets.
projectBlurbs.tidaka: Mobile app connecting sports coaches with their clients for training management, session planning, and progress tracking.
projectBlurbs.minishell: Bash fundamentals implemented in C at École 42. Parser, executor, heredocs, signals.
projectBlurbs.ft-containers: Reimplementation of the STL: vector, map, stack in C++98. Allocators, iterators, red-black tree.

contact.heading: Let's build
contact.subheading: Got a project that needs a sharp engineer? I'm available for freelance missions, short-term or long. Fastest reply via email.
